analysis_commentary: Clear regression on both goal diagnostics. Baseline (bs=4096) achieved illegal_mass_min=0.4944 and above_uniform_max=5, demonstrating real learning on legal moves. New run (bs=3072) stayed at illegal_mass_min=0.9989 (≈never allocates mass to legal moves) and above_uniform stuck at 0 the entire window, while max_prob climbed to 0.67 on illegal moves — incipient illegal-move collapse. Despite 446 training steps (vs baseline's 339) and sqrt-lr auto-scaling to ~4.33e-5, the network failed to reproduce the baseline's learning dynamics. Arena score 0.545 (CI 0.506-0.584) did not promote. Likely seed-variance: the reduced batch size perturbed gradient noise enough to land in the collapse basin instead of the learning basin.
